mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crack (CrackStart, CrackLength, CrackWidth, CrackHeight, CrackArea, CrackPerimeter, ImageUrl) VALUES (#{crackMap.crackStart}, #{crackMap.crackLength}, #{crackMap.crackWidth}, #{crackMap.crackHeight}, #{crackMap.crackArea}, #{crackMap.crackPerimeter}, #{crackMap.imageUrl})
